---
title: "eda"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
```

```{r}
clinical_dir <- "/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/clinical.cart.2026-04-07/"

clinical_raw <- read_tsv(
  file.path(clinical_dir, "clinical.tsv"),
  na = c("'--", "--", "", "NA")
)

glimpse(clinical_raw)
dim(clinical_raw)
```

```{r}
clinical_core <- clinical_raw %>%
  transmute(
    case_id = cases.submitter_id,
    days_to_death = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(demographic.days_to_death)),
    days_to_last_follow_up = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(diagnoses.days_to_last_follow_up)),
    vital_status = demographic.vital_status,
    age_at_diagnosis = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(diagnoses.age_at_diagnosis)),
    sex = demographic.gender,
    race = demographic.race,
    ethnicity = demographic.ethnicity
  ) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
clinical_survival <- clinical_core %>%
  mutate(
    survived_500d = case_when(
      !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death > 500 ~ 1,
      !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death <= 500 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
dim(clinical_survival)
```

```{r}
clinical_survival %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_unique_cases = n_distinct(case_id),
    n_with_days_to_death = sum(!is.na(days_to_death)),
    n_survived_500d_known = sum(!is.na(survived_500d)),
    n_survived_500d_yes = sum(survived_500d == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_survived_500d_no = sum(survived_500d == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
clinical_survival %>%
  count(case_id, sort = TRUE) %>%
  filter(n > 1)
```


```{r}
clinical_unique <- clinical_survival %>%
  group_by(case_id) %>%
  summarise(
    days_to_death = first(na.omit(days_to_death), default = NA_real_),
    days_to_last_follow_up = first(na.omit(days_to_last_follow_up), default = NA_real_),
    vital_status = first(na.omit(vital_status), default = NA_character_),
    age_at_diagnosis = first(na.omit(age_at_diagnosis), default = NA_real_),
    sex = first(na.omit(sex), default = NA_character_),
    race = first(na.omit(race), default = NA_character_),
    ethnicity = first(na.omit(ethnicity), default = NA_character_),
    survived_500d = first(na.omit(survived_500d), default = NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
clinical_unique %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases = n(),
    n_unique_case_ids = n_distinct(case_id),
    n_known_outcome = sum(!is.na(survived_500d)),
    n_yes = sum(survived_500d == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_no = sum(survived_500d == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

# RNA-seq data

```{r}
rna_dir <- "/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/"

rnaseq_raw <- read_csv(file.path(rna_dir, "gene_count_matrix_1pass_TCGA.csv"))

dim(rnaseq_raw)
names(rnaseq_raw)[1:10]
```


```{r}
names(rnaseq_raw)[1]
sum(duplicated(rnaseq_raw[[1]]))
```

```{r}
rna_mat <- rnaseq_raw %>%
  distinct(gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  as.matrix()

dim(rna_mat)
```

```{r}
rna_t <- t(rna_mat)

dim(rna_t)
```

```{r}
rna_df <- as.data.frame(rna_t) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    case_id = str_sub(sample_id, 1, 12)
  )
```

```{r}
dim(rna_df)

rna_df %>%
  select(sample_id, case_id) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

# Join RNA with clinical data

```{r}
rna_mat <- rnaseq_raw %>%
  distinct(gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  as.matrix()

dim(rna_mat)
```

```{r}
rna_samples <- tibble(sample_id = names(rnaseq_raw)[-1]) %>%
  mutate(
    case_id = str_sub(sample_id, 1, 12)
  )

rna_samples %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
rna_clinical <- rna_df %>%
  inner_join(
    clinical_unique %>%
      select(case_id, days_to_death, days_to_last_follow_up, vital_status, survived_500d),
    by = "case_id"
  )
```

```{r}
rna_clinical %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_cases = n_distinct(case_id),
    n_known_outcome = sum(!is.na(survived_500d)),
    n_yes = sum(survived_500d == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_no = sum(survived_500d == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
rna_model <- rna_clinical %>%
  filter(!is.na(survived_500d))
```

```{r}
dim(rna_model)

rna_model %>%
  count(survived_500d)
```


# Methylation sample sheet

```{r}
meth_dir <- "/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/"

meth_sheet <- read_tsv(
  file.path(meth_dir, "gdc_sample_sheet.2026-04-07.tsv")
)

glimpse(meth_sheet)
```

```{r}
meth_map <- meth_sheet %>%
  transmute(
    file_name = `File Name`,
    sample_id = `Sample ID`,
    case_id = `Case ID`
  ) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
meth_map %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
gene_counts <- rna_model %>%
  select(-sample_id, -case_id, -days_to_death, -days_to_last_follow_up, -vital_status, -survived_500d)
```

```{r}
dim(gene_counts)
```

```{r}
min_samples <- ceiling(0.10 * nrow(gene_counts))

keep_genes <- colSums(gene_counts >= 10, na.rm = TRUE) >= min_samples

table(keep_genes)

gene_counts_filt <- gene_counts[, keep_genes]

dim(gene_counts_filt)
```

```{r}
gene_counts_log <- log2(gene_counts_filt + 1)

dim(gene_counts_log)
```

```{r}
rna_model_filt <- bind_cols(
  rna_model %>%
    select(sample_id, case_id, days_to_death, days_to_last_follow_up, vital_status, survived_500d),
  gene_counts_log
)

dim(rna_model_filt)
```

```{r}
gene_var <- apply(gene_counts_log, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)

summary(gene_var)
```

```{r}
top_n <- 2000

top_genes <- names(sort(gene_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n]

gene_counts_top <- gene_counts_log[, top_genes]

dim(gene_counts_top)
```

```{r}
rna_model_top <- bind_cols(
  rna_model %>%
    select(sample_id, case_id, days_to_death, days_to_last_follow_up, vital_status, survived_500d),
  gene_counts_top
)

dim(rna_model_top)
```

```{r}
x_rna <- rna_model_top %>%
  select(-sample_id, -case_id, -days_to_death, -days_to_last_follow_up, -vital_status, -survived_500d) %>%
  as.matrix()

y <- factor(rna_model_top$survived_500d, levels = c(0, 1))
```

```{r}
dim(x_rna)
table(y)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 5,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)
```

```{r}
y_factor <- factor(ifelse(rna_model_top$survived_500d == 1, "Yes", "No"),
                   levels = c("No", "Yes"))
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

lasso_fit <- train(
  x = x_rna,
  y = y_factor,
  method = "glmnet",
  family = "binomial",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(
    alpha = 1,
    lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 50)
  )
)
```

```{r}
lasso_fit
plot(lasso_fit)
```

```{r}
lasso_fit$bestTune
max(lasso_fit$results$ROC)
```

```{r}
lasso_fit$results %>%
  arrange(desc(ROC)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
best_lambda <- lasso_fit$bestTune$lambda

coef_mat <- coef(lasso_fit$finalModel, s = best_lambda)

selected_genes <- rownames(coef_mat)[as.vector(coef_mat != 0)]
selected_genes <- selected_genes[!selected_genes %in% "(Intercept)"]

length(selected_genes)
head(selected_genes, 20)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

tune_grid_enet <- expand.grid(
  alpha = seq(0.1, 1, by = 0.1),
  lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 30)
)

enet_fit <- train(
  x = x_rna,
  y = y_factor,
  method = "glmnet",
  family = "binomial",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = tune_grid_enet
)
```

```{r}
enet_fit
enet_fit$bestTune
max(enet_fit$results$ROC)

enet_fit$results %>%
  arrange(desc(ROC)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
best_alpha <- enet_fit$bestTune$alpha
best_lambda <- enet_fit$bestTune$lambda

coef_mat_enet <- coef(enet_fit$finalModel, s = best_lambda)

selected_genes_enet <- rownames(coef_mat_enet)[as.vector(coef_mat_enet != 0)]
selected_genes_enet <- selected_genes_enet[!selected_genes_enet %in% "(Intercept)"]

length(selected_genes_enet)
head(selected_genes_enet, 20)

selected_genes
```

```{r}
master_map <- clinical_unique %>%
  select(case_id, days_to_death, days_to_last_follow_up, vital_status, survived_500d) %>%
  left_join(
    rna_df %>% select(case_id, rna_sample_id = sample_id),
    by = "case_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    meth_map %>% select(case_id, meth_sample_id = sample_id, meth_file_name = file_name),
    by = "case_id"
  )
```

```{r}
master_map %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_cases = n_distinct(case_id),
    n_with_outcome = sum(!is.na(survived_500d)),
    n_with_rna = sum(!is.na(rna_sample_id)),
    n_with_meth = sum(!is.na(meth_sample_id)),
    n_with_rna_and_meth = sum(!is.na(rna_sample_id) & !is.na(meth_sample_id)),
    n_with_all_three = sum(!is.na(survived_500d) & !is.na(rna_sample_id) & !is.na(meth_sample_id))
  )
```

```{r}
master_map %>%
  filter(!is.na(survived_500d), !is.na(rna_sample_id), !is.na(meth_sample_id)) %>%
  select(case_id, rna_sample_id, meth_sample_id, meth_file_name) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
meth_test_cases <- master_map %>%
  filter(!is.na(survived_500d), !is.na(meth_file_name)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 3)

meth_test_cases
```

```{r}
meth_folder <- file.path(meth_dir, "MethylationData")
```

```{r}
test_file_1 <- file.path(meth_folder, meth_test_cases$meth_file_name[1])

meth_one <- read_tsv(
  test_file_1,
  col_names = FALSE,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

names(meth_one) <- c("probe_id", "beta_value")
glimpse(meth_one)
dim(meth_one)
head(meth_one)
```
```{r}
meth_test_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(meth_test_cases)), function(i) {
  f <- meth_test_cases$meth_file_name[i]
  
  x <- read_tsv(
    file.path(meth_folder, f),
    col_names = FALSE,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )
  
  names(x) <- c("probe_id", "beta_value")
  
  list(
    file_name = f,
    dim = dim(x),
    head = head(x)
  )
})

meth_test_list
```

```{r}
meth_complete_map <- master_map %>%
  filter(!is.na(survived_500d), !is.na(rna_sample_id), !is.na(meth_file_name)) %>%
  select(case_id, meth_sample_id, meth_file_name, survived_500d)

dim(meth_complete_map)
meth_complete_map %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
read_meth_file <- function(file_name, case_id, meth_folder) {
  x <- read_tsv(
    file.path(meth_folder, file_name),
    col_names = FALSE,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )
  
  names(x) <- c("probe_id", case_id)
  x
}
```

```{r}
meth_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(meth_complete_map)), function(i) {
  read_meth_file(
    file_name = meth_complete_map$meth_file_name[i],
    case_id = meth_complete_map$case_id[i],
    meth_folder = meth_folder
  )
})
```

```{r}
library(purrr)

meth_wide <- reduce(meth_list, full_join, by = "probe_id")
```

```{r}
dim(meth_wide)
meth_wide %>% slice_head(n = 5)
```

```{r}
meth_mat <- meth_wide %>%
  column_to_rownames("probe_id") %>%
  as.matrix()

meth_t <- t(meth_mat)

dim(meth_t)
```

```{r}
meth_df <- as.data.frame(meth_t) %>%
  rownames_to_column("case_id") %>%
  as_tibble()
```

```{r}
dim(meth_df)
meth_df %>% select(case_id) %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
master_complete <- meth_complete_map %>%
  select(case_id, survived_500d)
```

```{r}
meth_model <- master_complete %>%
  inner_join(meth_df, by = "case_id")
```

```{r}
dim(meth_model)

meth_model %>%
  count(survived_500d)
```

```{r}
meth_values <- meth_model %>%
  select(-case_id, -survived_500d)
```

```{r}
probe_keep_na <- colMeans(!is.na(meth_values)) >= 0.90

table(probe_keep_na)

meth_values_filt <- meth_values[, probe_keep_na]

dim(meth_values_filt)
```
```{r}
meth_mat_filt <- as.matrix(meth_values_filt)

meth_var <- apply(meth_mat_filt, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)

top_n_meth <- 2000
top_meth_probes <- names(sort(meth_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n_meth]

meth_top_mat <- meth_mat_filt[, top_meth_probes, drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
col_medians_top <- apply(meth_top_mat, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE)

for (j in seq_len(ncol(meth_top_mat))) {
  miss <- is.na(meth_top_mat[, j])
  if (any(miss)) {
    meth_top_mat[miss, j] <- col_medians_top[j]
  }
}
```

```{r}
meth_top <- as.data.frame(meth_top_mat)
dim(meth_top)
```

```{r}
meth_model_top <- bind_cols(
  meth_model %>% select(case_id, survived_500d),
  as_tibble(meth_top)
)

dim(meth_model_top)
```

```{r}
meth_model_top <- meth_model_top %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("meth_", .x), -c(case_id, survived_500d))
```

```{r}
rna_model_top2 <- rna_model_top %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ paste0("rna_", .x),
    -c(sample_id, case_id, days_to_death, days_to_last_follow_up, vital_status, survived_500d)
  )
```

```{r}
master_omics <- rna_model_top2 %>%
  select(case_id, survived_500d, starts_with("rna_")) %>%
  inner_join(
    meth_model_top %>%
      select(case_id, starts_with("meth_")),
    by = "case_id"
  )
```

```{r}
dim(master_omics)

master_omics %>%
  count(survived_500d)
```

```{r}
x_multi <- master_omics %>%
  select(-case_id, -survived_500d) %>%
  as.matrix()

y_multi <- factor(ifelse(master_omics$survived_500d == 1, "Yes", "No"),
                  levels = c("No", "Yes"))

dim(x_multi)
table(y_multi)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

lasso_multi <- train(
  x = x_multi,
  y = y_multi,
  method = "glmnet",
  family = "binomial",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(
    alpha = 1,
    lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 50)
  )
)
```

```{r}
lasso_multi
plot(lasso_multi)

lasso_multi$bestTune
max(lasso_multi$results$ROC)

lasso_multi$results %>%
  arrange(desc(ROC)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
best_lambda_multi <- lasso_multi$bestTune$lambda

coef_mat_multi <- coef(lasso_multi$finalModel, s = best_lambda_multi)

selected_features_multi <- rownames(coef_mat_multi)[as.vector(coef_mat_multi != 0)]
selected_features_multi <- selected_features_multi[!selected_features_multi %in% "(Intercept)"]

length(selected_features_multi)
head(selected_features_multi, 20)
```
